data.narrative:
Solar Foods is a public-stage biotech & health company that has raised $160M+ to date. The peer universe comprises 4 same-sector, same-stage comparables: Tempus AI ($6.0B), Freenome ($2.6B), Recursion Pharmaceuticals ($1.8B), and Alto Neuroscience ($529M), with valuations spanning $529M to $6.0B.

The peer-median method is the applicable triangulation approach given available data. The median valuation across the 4 biotech & health peers is $2.2B. A revenue-based approach using the sector median P/S multiple of 5.8x cannot be applied, as Solar Foods' revenue is not on file. This single-method constraint limits the robustness of cross-validation.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $1.9B to $2.5B, centered on $2.2B. The median reflects the central tendency of the peer set, while the range ($1.9B–$2.5B) acknowledges the dispersion within the comp universe. Key uncertainties stem from the single applicable method—peer-median comparables—and the absence of revenue data that would allow P/S anchoring. The wide peer range ($529M–$6.0B) also underscores heterogeneity in the biotech sector at this stage. Additional financial disclosures or transaction data would strengthen conviction in this valuation band.
